objective: Verify mkdirSync is statically imported and save() is synchronous in graph.ts, run npm build/test/lint gates, then remove the stale known-issues entry from CLAUDE.md.
key_changes: Confirm src/store/graph.ts already has mkdirSync in the top-level static import from fs
Confirm save() has no await keyword — it is a plain synchronous function
Run npm run build and confirm TypeScript exits 0 with no TS1308 errors
Run npm test and confirm vitest passes including the CART-B01 regression guard
Run npm run lint and confirm ESLint exits 0
Remove the stale known-issues bullet from CLAUDE.md once all gates are green
